name: Cuatro Remix
title: Cuatro Remix Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Cuatro Remix | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A simple highball cocktail made with Bacardí Añejo Cuatro rum, ginger ale, and a splash of pineapple juice.
marketing_description: Don't let its golden colour fool you. Our versatile BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum is the perfect spirit for mixing delicious cocktails. Simply mix it with ginger ale and pineapple juice.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Build all ingredients directly in the glass.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Cuatro Remix 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum 100 ml ginger ale splash of pineapple juice ... Fill a highball glass with ice. Build all ingredients directly in the glass. Stir gently. Garnish with a lime wheel.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Cuatro Remix Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
